# SL-INDEX-011: google-indexable-url-not-indexed

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

Google reports that an indexable route is not indexed.

## Metadata

- Category: Indexability (indexability)
- Default severity: error
- Confidence: certain
- Scope: page
- Provider scope: google
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- google

## Required Evidence

- route-contract
- google-observation
- observed-at
- fetched-at

## When This Triggers

Compare route contract with latest Google URL Inspection coverage state.

## False Positives

False positives are usually caused by stale or sampled external observations.
Check the observation date, freshness, and provider payload before suppressing.

## How To Fix

Review Google exclusion reason and fix crawl, canonical, quality, or indexing
blockers.

## Examples

Bad-case fixture reference:

- fixtures/indexability/google-not-indexed

Fixed direction:

- Review Google exclusion reason and fix crawl, canonical, quality, or indexing
  blockers.

The generated documentation does not invent HTML, DSL, source locations,
selectors, or external observations beyond the catalog fixture references above.

## Implementation Surfaces

- Google integration must provide dated, freshness-aware observations before
  this rule can use Google evidence.
